CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-30-2023 Off Calendar

Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment
Off Calendar Jun-06-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No Appearances.

Plaintiff PRECILA BALABBO's Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment.

The court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: Plaintiff PRECILA BALABBO's unopposed motion to approve Proposition 65 settlement and consent judgment is granted.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the tentative ruling.

Judge: Richard B, Ulmer Jr., Clerk: R. Woods, Not Reported. (302/RBU)
